response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed systems experience, including real-time systems and microservices, but lacks direct experience with multi-agent AI systems, fintech-specific domains (e.g., working-capital management or credit risk), and executive leadership in scaling teams to 30+ engineers. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is promising but not yet production-proven in regulated or high-stakes environments.
strengths: Strong distributed systems and real-time backend expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Experience with AI-agent frameworks and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven track record of scaling engineering teams and adopting modern practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech or regulated environments
Limited fintech infrastructure familiarity (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lacks direct executive leadership experience scaling teams to 30+ engineers or governing hybrid models with external partners
